scoring_rubric: 1-5 each: feasibility (can it stand alone), market (LatAm opportunity), effort (INVERSE packaging effort - higher = less work), reuse (reuse potential). composite = mean.

evidence.feasibility: src/utils/calculations.js is a pure engine; src/data/constants.js is a data-driven 422-SKU catalogue with dual price lists (venta/web); tests/validation.js locks behavior — hecho confirmado. Docked 1: UI (PanelinCalculadoraV3) and Sheets/CRM wiring are BMC-specific.
evidence.market: Live production system with real distributor workflows (PDF, WhatsApp export, BOM); three commercialization directions pre-explored 2026-05-16 — hecho confirmado. LatAm construction-distributor niche has no dominant regional CPQ (inferencia, see brief).
evidence.effort: Multi-tenancy, per-tenant catalog ingestion (Matriz-equivalent), billing, and de-BMC branding are all net-new — inferencia from single-tenant config in server/config.js.
evidence.reuse: Engine + PDF templates + BOM logic are catalog-agnostic by design (constants-driven; p(item) price resolver; buildQuotationModel abstraction) — hecho confirmado.

evidence.feasibility: Self-contained pipeline: scraper, deduplication, delta, alerts (email), scheduler under server/lib/marketIntel/, triggered via server/routes/mlEtlRun.js; competitor seeds in scripts/seed-full-competitors.mjs — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: Every MercadoLibre seller needs competitor pricing; regional incumbents exist (Nubimetrics, Real Trends) proving willingness to pay — hecho confirmado via Stage-3 research.
evidence.effort: Needs tenant-facing UI, self-serve competitor selection, and isolation from BMC Postgres — inferencia; core ETL already runs on a schedule.
evidence.reuse: Scraper/dedup/delta/alert pattern generalizes to any ML category — inferencia from category-agnostic pipeline structure.

evidence.feasibility: rag.js + embeddings.js are provider-agnostic (pgvector cosine); KB has its own migrations (kb-package/), surface (kbSurface.js) and analytics (kbAnalytics.js) — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: Pre-explored direction (2026-05-16); niche B2B buyers (construction e-commerce, distributors) — but horizontal RAG-as-a-service is crowded (duda abierta: paying demand for a construction-specific KB API is unproven).
evidence.effort: API productization = API keys, rate limits, billing, docs; auth primitives already exist (identityAuth.js JWT) — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: The RAG stack is fully content-agnostic; swap the KB corpus and it serves any vertical — hecho confirmado from provider-agnostic embeddings design.

candidates.name: Configurable AI sales-chatbot template for construction e-commerce

evidence.feasibility: agentCore.js is the shared brain across chat/ML/WA channels with Anthropic+OpenAI provider chain; live calc access via loopback HTTP (calcLoopbackClient.js, provenance source:ae_agent); auto-learn (autoLearnExtractor.js) — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: Pre-explored direction; WhatsApp-first LatAm commerce favors quoting bots over generic chat — inferencia supported by Stage-3 comparables bundling AI agents.
evidence.effort: De-BMC-ification is substantial: prompts (chatPrompts), training KB, and tools assume the BMC catalog; per-customer config surface is net-new — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: Provider chain, SSE route, tool registry, and training-correction loop (agentTraining.js, per-message Good/Correct) reuse as-is — hecho confirmado.

candidates.name: Quotation PDF template engine (7 layouts + QuotationModel)

evidence.feasibility: Each template receives a QuotationModel and returns self-contained HTML; dispatcher with LAYOUT_OPTIONS; dual pipeline (server Chromium vectorial + html2pdf.js raster fallback) — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: Document/proposal generation is dominated by horizontal players (PandaDoc, Qwilr); a standalone quote-PDF engine is hard to sell alone — inferencia.
evidence.effort: Already model-driven; needs npm packaging + docs — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: buildQuotationModel() decouples data from layout; templates are brandable — hecho confirmado.

candidates.note: Folded into calc-whitelabel-saas brief as an add-on revenue path rather than a standalone brief (same quote pipeline; market score 2).

candidates.name: WhatsApp Cloud API sales cockpit (team inbox + AI quoting)

evidence.feasibility: Own Postgres migrations (wa-package/, npm run wa:migrate, wa_schema_migrations ledger per issue #359) and route surface — hecho confirmado. Docked: entangled with Sheets CRM flows (issue #517 shows mixed WA/Sheets route) — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: WhatsApp-first sales is THE LatAm channel; incumbents (Callbell, Wati, Leadsales) validate pricing — hecho confirmado via Stage-3 research. Crowded, so differentiation = integrated AI quoting.
evidence.effort: Meta app review, multi-tenant WABA onboarding, and unbundling from BMC CRM are heavy — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: Cockpit + operator auth (waOperatorAuth.js) + soak-tested queue (migration 014, WA soak runbook in latest commit 7b0d3a2) reusable — hecho confirmado.

candidates.name: Panelin MCP server (22-tool external agent surface)

evidence.feasibility: 22 tools defined (calc, catalog, state, PDF, CRM, WhatsApp, telemetry) for MCP clients (Claude, GPT Builder, Cursor) — hecho confirmado from agent definition. Docked: depends on the live BMC API.
evidence.market: MCP ecosystem is growing fast, but monetization of MCP servers is unproven — duda abierta.
evidence.effort: Surface exists; needs auth/metering for external tenants — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: The pattern (expose a domain calculator as MCP tools) is a repeatable template across verticals — inferencia.

evidence.feasibility: Dedicated geometry/theme/typography modules with meter-based SVG coordinate system, cut-panel indicators, plano-BOM verification badge — hecho confirmado from agent-definition inventory.
evidence.market: Very niche (panel-layout dimensioning); buyers are other panel software vendors — inferencia.
evidence.effort: Extract as React lib; already componentized — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: ISO 129 dimensioning + chain-dimension layout applies to any rectangular-panel domain (solar, drywall) — inferencia.

candidates.name: TraKtiMe — time tracking + always-on-top desktop timer

evidence.feasibility: Own migrations, own routes, /hub/traktime/* UI, and a dedicated Tauri 2 desktop app (src-tauri/Cargo.toml: 'bmc-traktime … always-on-top mini window', tray + global shortcut) — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: Time tracking is hyper-saturated with strong free tiers (Toggl, Clockify) — hecho confirmado (well-known market).
evidence.effort: Small surface; desktop shell exists — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: Tauri always-on-top mini-window pattern reusable for other micro-tools — inferencia.

candidates.name: Omni — omnichannel AI job queue + automation rules

evidence.feasibility: AI registry with per-day budget (USD 50/día, issue #420), job queue with attempts/claims (aiWorker.js), automation rules with regex guards, omni_deals — hecho confirmado from issues #409/#420. Docked: flag-gated, hardening items still open.
evidence.market: AI-orchestration middleware is hot but competitive; differentiator unclear yet — duda abierta.
evidence.effort: WAVE 3/4 hardening incomplete (issue #409 deferred items) — hecho confirmado.
evidence.reuse: Budgeted-AI-job-queue pattern reusable across products — inferencia.

evidence.feasibility: Own package (AGENTS.md, migrations, prompts, src) and routes — hecho confirmado. Docked: driver flows assume BMC delivery ops.
evidence.market: Last-mile/delivery tooling for LatAm SMB distributors exists but fragmented — inferencia.
evidence.effort: Needs standalone auth, tenant model, mobile polish — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: Driver/inspector role flows reusable for any distributor — inferencia.

evidence.feasibility: Structured package (graph/, lib/, tests/) — hecho confirmado. Depth unverified this run (duda abierta: LOC small relative to other modules).
evidence.market: Telegram is secondary to WhatsApp in LatAm commerce — inferencia.

candidates.name: Shopify storefront MCP chat agent (customized template)

evidence.feasibility: Complete app (React Router 7 + Prisma + theme extension, own Dockerfile) — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: Base template is Shopify's own free/open template (README links shopify.dev storefront-mcp docs) — hecho confirmado; hard to charge for what Shopify gives away.
evidence.effort: Would need meaningful differentiation beyond the free base — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: MCP-client wiring (app/mcp-client.js) instructive for other storefront agents — hecho confirmado.

candidates.name: Identity/RBAC mini-stack (JWT + Google OAuth + TOTP + grants)

evidence.feasibility: Complete: JWT issue/validate, Google OAuth, TOTP 2FA, module-scoped grants — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: Auth is a commodity dominated by Auth0/Clerk/Supabase Auth free tiers — hecho confirmado (well-known market).
evidence.effort: Extractable but selling auth requires security posture (audits) far beyond packaging — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: High internal reuse for every spin-off product above — hecho confirmado.

evidence.feasibility: Working harness with golden cases (GC-0003 referenced in issue #358) — hecho confirmado.
evidence.market: Promptfoo itself is open-source; the harness is methodology, not product — hecho confirmado.
evidence.effort: N/A as product; near-zero as internal reuse — inferencia.
evidence.reuse: Golden-case pattern transfers to every AI spin-off — inferencia.
